# Spirit Connect AIPE Labs

> Power Electronics AI Agent — from device to converter to grid. Resources for
> power electronics and power systems design: semiconductor device data,
> magnetics databases, converter design references, and microgrid architectures.
> Point your AI coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, etc.) at this file to give it
> access to everything below.

## Power Electronics

- [Devices](https://aipel.co.uk/power/devices/): Semiconductor device testing, modelling, and characterisation (SiC, GaN, Si) — electrical and thermal characterisation for design automation
- [Device Characterisation](https://aipel.co.uk/power/characterizations/): Switching characteristics, switching losses, thermal resistance, and junction temperature analysis
- [Converters](https://aipel.co.uk/power/converters/): Converter topologies, magnetics sizing, control synthesis, and multi-objective optimization (LLC, DAB, multi-level DC-AC, interleaved buck/boost)
- [Microgrids](https://aipel.co.uk/power/microgrids/): Microgrid architectures, DC distribution networks, and hybrid AC/DC power systems

## Databases

- [Transistor Database](https://aipel.co.uk/database/transistors/): Power semiconductor device database
- [Magnetics Database](https://aipel.co.uk/database/magnetics/): Magnetic components and core material database

## Case Studies

- [Dual Active Bridge (DAB)](https://aipel.co.uk/case-studies/dab/): DAB converter design case study
- [Solid-State Transformer (SST)](https://aipel.co.uk/case-studies/sst/): SST design case study
- [Rogowski Coil](https://aipel.co.uk/case-studies/magnetics/rogowski-coil/): Rogowski coil current transducer design

## Resources

- [Blog](https://aipel.co.uk/resources/blog/): Engineering notes and research updates on AI-driven power electronics design
- [Design Prototypes](https://aipel.co.uk/resources/prototypes/): Hardware prototypes and AI-assisted design case studies

## Company

- [About](https://aipel.co.uk/company/about/): Mission and vision — a closed-loop energy-AI ecosystem
- [Services](https://aipel.co.uk/company/services/): What the Power Electronics AI Agent does
- [Contact](https://aipel.co.uk/contact/): Get in touch — info@spiritconnect.co.uk
